CustomField.description: This Field is required under the "Electronic Delivery Section" when the Opportunity is moved to "Stage-6 " and the details are sent to NetSuite when the Order is processed through integration(ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mandatory field, Opportunity cannot be submitted to Stage 6 if blank. Add email for contact in this field that will receive a software email notification
CustomField.label: Primary Email Address
